# Dimare Design

> Handcrafted bohemian decor and macramé for luxury hotels and resorts. Based in Turkey, operating worldwide.

Dimare Design is a Turkish artisan studio specializing in bespoke macramé, handwoven textiles, outdoor bohemian furniture, and large-scale lobby installations for 5-star and boutique hotels. Founded in 2016, the studio has completed 90+ projects across 3 countries including Turkey, Greece, and the UAE, with additional work in Germany.

## Products

- **Macramé Wall Art** — Custom-sized woven panels for hotel lobbies, spa areas, and room feature walls
- **Bohemian Outdoor Furniture** — Handcrafted swings, hammocks, hanging chairs for pool decks and beach clubs
- **Woven Canopies & Ceiling Installations** — Large-scale overhead textile installations for restaurants, bars, and event spaces
- **Custom Textile Collections** — Bedding, cushions, throw blankets with artisan finishes

## Notable Hotel Projects

- Vogue Supreme Bodrum — Pool deck and cabana décor (2024)
- Rixos Premium Belek — Lobby and spa installation (2023)
- Regnum Carya — Beach club décor (2023)
- TUI Blue Palm Garden — Outdoor furniture collection (2022)
- Gloria Hotels — Custom macramé series (2022)

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2016, Turkey
- Projects completed: 90+
- Hotels served: 20
- Countries: 3
- Languages: Turkish, English
- Lead time: 4–8 weeks per project
- Custom orders: Yes, all products are made to specification

## Contact & Sales

- Website: https://www.dimare.design
- Etsy shop: https://www.etsy.com/shop/dimaredesign
- Instagram: @dimaredesign
- Project inquiries: https://www.dimare.design/iletisim

## Specializations

luxury hotel decor, macramé, bohemian textiles, outdoor furniture, hotel lobby art, resort decoration, handmade wall art, artisan hospitality decor, custom hotel installations, Mediterranean resort style
